untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Price at 1.0 SD from 20-period MA — no standard deviation indicator available; (2) ATR > 60th percentile of last 40 bars — percentile calculation over rolling window not supported; (3) Technical divergence detection — divergence patterns require historical comparison logic not expressible in simple 3-field conditions; (4) Precise 100% move amplitude exit — requires trade entry price memory and amplitude calculation unavailable
translation_notes: Partially translated using available indicators: approximated 1.0 SD extreme as price distance from sma_20, used atr_14 with fixed threshold (60) as proxy for volatility elevation, mapped RSI extrema (>80 or <20) for momentum confirmation, approximated volume spike with vol_ratio_20 multiplier. True implementation requires custom divergence detection and percentile-based volatility measurement.
